data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of net terms (Net-15/30/45) and due-date tracking. However, the evidence does not explicitly confirm that these functionalities are implemented or tested in the booking process. The linked use case mentions the need for net terms and due-date tracking, but there is no evidence provided that demonstrates these features are operational, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of net terms (Net-15/30/45) and due-date tracking in the booking process.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
